content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.62%, Pharma +2.35%, Metal +1.92%, Realty +1.95%, IT +1.85% all firm; VIX cooling -5.89% to 18.55. Book is 54% deployed and +0.39% on the day with multiple positions in profit — focus is position management (trailing SLs) rather than chasing breakouts. Already have working LIMIT orders on HINDZINC and TATAPOWER pending.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1% with strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, NIM 3.69%). Current SL at 1035.47 is above entry — good. Tightening SL slightly to 1015 to lock in ~3% gains while giving room above today's intraday low (1040.75) and pivot S1 (978). Trail behind recent strength but stay below current support."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op check: SL already at breakeven 404.50, target 425. Position +2.1%. Per trailing mandate, +2% triggers BE-trail which is already in place. HOLD via position_actions instead — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.9% but thesis intact: strong Q4 (PAT +27%, GNPA 1.45%), CMP 79.36 above SL 77.50 with cushion. PSU bank sector up only modestly today. Hold; SL at 77.50 (below 78.36 S1) is appropriate buffer."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -0.5%, gold near record highs, rangebound today. Hold as portfolio hedge given India VIX at 18.5 still elevated."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "No-op — existing SL 1418 and target 1480 unchanged. Reverting to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1% but SL at 694.48 is already above entry (681) and just below CMP 696.90. Q4 results due Apr 29 (binary event in 2 days). Form 483 overhang is a known risk. Current tight SL is appropriate; if it triggers, exit cleanly before earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, Q4 results Apr 30 (3 days). SL at 2260 (~3.6% below entry) is wide but appropriate ahead of binary event; tightening risks getting stopped on pre-results volatility. CMP 2348 above today's VWAP. Hold into results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3% post-Q4. NII +43% positive but GNPA 3.43% remains high vs peers. CMP 881.65, SL at 850 (3.2% below entry). Allow position room to develop; not yet at threshold to trail."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-Q4. SL 77.50 still appropriate; CMP 79.36 has cushion."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1035.47 — wait, 1035 is already above proposed 1015. Keeping SL at 1035.47 (already locks ~5% gains). Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; gold at record highs, hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94 — breakeven+ trail in place. Gain only +1.1%, not at +2% trail trigger yet."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 694.48 already locking small gain, just below CMP. Q4 binary in 2 days — let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2260 wide but appropriate before Apr 30 results; not in profit so no trail mandate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 404.50. Position +2.1%, just at trail trigger — current breakeven-trail satisfies mandate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain +0.3% — below 2% trail threshold. SL 850 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL 10.6x volume surge with battery-materials catalyst is interesting but +23% in 4 sessions = overbought; wait for pullback to 540-550 zone. INDUSINDBK already held; not adding. SUNPHARMA +7% on Organon deal — let it consolidate. POWERGRID/TATAPOWER/NTPC power cluster: already exposed via NTPC + pending TATAPOWER LIMIT @443; do NOT add more power names. PVRINOX, ANANTRAJ, UTIAMC — interesting but not setting up cleanly today. AXISBANK weakness — wait for stabilization.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 54% deployed across 8 positions with net +0.39% on the day. Two pending LIMITs (HINDZINC 612, TATAPOWER 443) still working — not stacking. Hysteresis principle: avoid new entries with book mid-deployed and multiple binary earnings events looming (GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, NTPC May 15). Win rate 5% over 5 days is concerning — emphasizing position management and tighter risk control over new adds. Sector exposure: Banks (MAHABANK + INDUSINDBK + PNBHOUSING-financial) ~25%, FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) ~7%, Pharma (GRANULES) ~5%, Energy/Power (NTPC, plus pending TATAPOWER) ~10% — within limits but power cluster will be near 15% if TATAPOWER fills. No new entries this tick."
}
